spec.description: This Dashboard gives you a handy overview of a cluster.

options.content:
Clustername: ${cluster}
K8S Version: ${k8sversion}
_____________________
Owner: ${customer}
Installation: ${installation}
Region: ${region}
Service Priority: ${priority}

spec.title: Usage for selected disks
spec.description: Only showing disks with usage above 10 percent. Not including persistent volumes.

spec.title: API Server Availability (30d)
spec.description: How many percent of requests (both read and write) in 30 days have been answered successfully and fast enough?

spec.title: Change Log
spec.description: The Change Log of all recent changes from Giant Swarm

spec.title: Healthy
spec.description: Amount of Nodes with healthy status

spec.title: Unhealthy
spec.description: Amount of Nodes with unhealthy status

spec.title: Cluster Overview
